basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of SVNIT. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SVNIT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/physically challenged and women.

qualification.details: First-division B.Tech/BE in Civil Engineering/Mechanical Engineering and M.Tech/M.E in Structural Engineering, Structural Dynamics Engineering, or Earthquake Engineering. Qualified GATE/NET.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download SVNIT Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at SVNIT is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a first-division B.Tech/BE in Civil or Mechanical Engineering, followed by an M.Tech/M.E in Structural Engineering, Structural Dynamics Engineering, or Earthquake Engineering, and must have qualified GATE/NET.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 30 years. Age relaxation is provided for specific categories.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC categories, as well as for physically challenged and women applicants.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000/- to Rs. 42,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the SVNIT JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application with all required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at SVNIT.

faq.question: Q10. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT).
